body:
# bundesAPI Marktstammdaten API and Official MaStR

## Relationship

The bundesAPI project is tracked as documentation/API-description work around Marktstammdatenregister access paths.

## Caveat

This relationship records API documentation relevance. It does not assert that the project is an official Bundesnetzagentur publication.

# Marktstammdatenregister.dev and Official MaStR

## Relationship

Marktstammdatenregister.dev is tracked as an alternative public access and exploration layer for MaStR data.

## Caveat

This relationship records source-data dependence. Update cadence, licence status, and completeness require review.

# MaStR MCP Server and bundesAPI Marktstammdaten API

## Relationship

Both projects are tracked around AI- and developer-accessible MaStR queries. The API-description work may be useful context for connector review.

## Caveat

This is a review candidate relationship, not a verified dependency or integration.

# MaStR MCP Server and Marktstammdatenregister.dev

## Relationship

Both projects are tracked as different public access patterns for MaStR data: one as an MCP connector and one as a Datasette-style exploration layer.

## Caveat

This relationship records alternative access patterns. It does not imply equivalent scope or functionality.

# MaStR MCP Server and Official MaStR

## Relationship

MaStR MCP Server is tracked as a connector that reads from public and credentialed Marktstammdatenregister access paths.

## Caveat

This relationship records input-source dependence. It does not assert any ownership, endorsement, or official status.

# MaStR MCP Server and open-MaStR

## Relationship

Both projects are tracked under `EP-701` because they improve developer access to the German Marktstammdatenregister.

## Caveat

This relationship records shared registry context. It does not claim that MaStR MCP Server depends on, reuses, or wraps open-MaStR code.

# open-MaStR and Official MaStR

## Relationship

open-MaStR is tracked as a package for downloading, accessing, and processing official Marktstammdatenregister data.

## Caveat

This relationship records source-data dependence. It does not change the need to review official MaStR data reuse terms.
